testing_progress.highlight: Chaos testing (blob spam, malicious CL) planned this week pending Aussie PR merges
300M gas limit and >8,192 deposit payloads not yet tested on devnet
DevNet 8 targeted as large public devnet ~2 weeks out; testnet upgrades hoped for September
Parallel non-finality DevNet and decoupled consensus test also planned alongside DevNet 8
Potuz running Kurtosis fork-choice scenarios; results broadly correct but unexplained stray attestations observed

builder_api_and_epbs.highlight: Builder API and POST ProduceBlock spec PRs must merge before clients can implement; blocking DevNet 8 readiness
Terence: delaying API merge risks it landing too late even for testnet; early review critical
CommitBoost and MevBoost community willing to help test once builder API is finalized
Ahead-of-time builder preferences still unresolved; Nico favors simplifying spec and dropping uncertain complexity

action_items.action: Review and merge beacon-APIs PR #625 (POST ProduceBlock), keymanager-APIs PR #87, and related builder-specs change
Raise builder API testing coordination with MevBoost community call (PBS Foundation)

decisions.decision: Kurtosis preferred over devnet for controlled fork-choice / attestation debugging

targets.target: DevNet 8: large public devnet, ~first week of August
Testnet upgrades: September (tentative, dependent on findings)
Builder API / direct-connection changes targeted for DevNet 8 (~2 weeks)
